utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Look at Emma !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I just can not decide who she looks more alike , you or Rachel ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh what are you kidding ? She is gorgeous , it is all Rachel .

emotion_cause.span: 4_what are you kidding ? She is gorgeous , it is all Rachel .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I am sorry , for the last time , why are not you two together again ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_why are not you two together again ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: No , I know .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I know , because you are not in that place .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Which would be fine , except you totally are .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: It is ... it is complicated okay ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah that is true . Yeah , you love her . You always have . You have a child together . There is no right answer .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Look , we have been together .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Okay ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: And then apart , and then together , and then apart , and now we have a baby .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: It is just if ... if we got together again and it did not work out ... I could never do that to Emma .

emotion_cause.span: 14_if ... if we got together again and it did not work out ... I could never do that to Emma .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I mean she ... she thinking everything ... Oh that is ... now me .

emotion_cause.span: 14_if ... if we got together again and it did not work out ... I could never do that to Emma .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: What do they put something in the water in this place ?

emotion_cause.span: 16_do they put something in the water in this place ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Since Rachel and I we are doing really , we are doing really well right now .

emotion_cause.span: 18_if you try to make it more you might wreck it .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I know . I know . I know . I know , and if you try to make it more you might wreck it .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yeah , exactly .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Right . Or you might get everything you have wanted since you were fifteen .
